goal: Create a simple Python module (hello.py) that prints 'hello world' and write a pytest test suite (test_hello.py) to verify its functionality.
scope: Create hello.py that prints 'hello world' to stdout
Create test_hello.py containing pytest tests that import and verify hello.py
out_of_scope: Setting up project-wide configuration or virtual environment

acceptance_criteria.expected: hello.py exists and is importable as a valid Python module
test_hello.py exists and all pytest tests pass

acceptance_criteria.check: Does test_hello.py import hello.py and test its behavior?
acceptance_criteria.expected: Test file properly imports the module and validates its output
